case neg

χ ξ : Formula ℕ

inst✝ : Entailment.F L
φ : Formula ℕ
hφ : φ ∈ L
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ)
h₁ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
h₂ : Γ.conj ➝ Γ.conj ⋏ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
this✝ : Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
this : Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
have h_conj : Γ.conj ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      induction Γ using Finset.induction_on with
      | empty => apply mem_omega_of_mem; apply T.mem_of_provable; simp
      | insert δ Γ ih =>
        apply construction_omega_andClosed _ (ih (λ x hx => hΓ (Finset.mem_insert_of_mem hx)))
        use (encode φ)

have h₃ : χ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by
      induction (encode φ) generalizing Γ with
      | zero =>
        simp [construction] at hΓ; apply T.mem_trans (ψ := Γ.conj) _ (T.mem_trans h₂ h₁)
        induction Γ using Finset.induction_on with
        | empty => apply T.mem_of_provable; apply af; apply impId
        | insert γ Γ' ih =>
          apply T.imp_closed (Logic.iff_provable.mp (by simp))
          apply T.andIR (by simpa using hΓ (by simp)) ih
      | succ i ih =>
        dsimp [construction] at hΓ; split at hΓ
        . split_ifs with h_cond
          . rename_i δ _; by_cases hδΓ : δ ∈ Γ
            . exfalso; apply h_cond (Γ.erase δ) (by intro x hx; have := hΓ (by simp [Finset.mem_erase.1 hx])

apply construction_omega_not_mem_csq;
    have h_conj : Γ.conj ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      induction Γ using Finset.induction_on generalizing hΓ with
      | empty => apply mem_omega_of_mem

have h_safe : ∀ i Γ, ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro i; induction i with
      | zero =>
        intro Γ hΓ h; apply hT

have h_conj : Γ.conj ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      induction Γ using Finset.induction_on with
      | empty => apply mem_omega_of_mem; apply T.mem_of_provable; simp
      | insert γ Γ₀ _ ih =>
        apply construction_omega_andClosed (Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨encode φ, hΓ (by simp)⟩)
        apply ih
successful_attempts: exact not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁ (mem_omega_of_mem $ T.mem_of_provable $ af $ Logic.iff_provable.mpr hφ)

apply not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁

    apply Logic.iff_provable.mp
    apply af
    exact Logic.iff_provable.mpr hφ
exact not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁ (mem_omega_of_mem $ T.mem_of_provable $ af $ Logic.iff_provable.mpr hφ)
